_comment: Edit this list freely. Each entry needs `name`, `lat`, `lng` and `note`. Optional fields: `tag` (short categorization), `address`, `link`. Coordinates: open Google Maps, right-click the spot → click the lat/lng to copy.

spots.name: Frontier Restaurant
spots.note: Sweet rolls, huevos rancheros, and the same neon-lit booths since 1971. A rite of passage near UNM.

spots.name: Mary & Tito's Café
spots.note: Carne adovada turnover that won the James Beard. Order it. Don't overthink it.

spots.name: El Pinto
spots.note: Sprawling north-valley patio, salsa they bottle and ship, and a margarita worth lingering over.

spots.name: Tia B's La Waffleria
spots.note: Waffles built like sandwiches. Get the breakfast burrito waffle and don't argue with the menu.

spots.name: Sadie's of New Mexico
spots.note: The hot salsa is famous for a reason. Carne adovada, sopaipillas, and a margarita you'll think about later.

spots.name: Cocina Azul
spots.note: Solid blue corn enchiladas and a green chile that punches above its weight.
